msgs.text:
Turn 108 — attachment-only state-transition lemma The required attachments are present, and the latest attached history already fixes the two-coordinate state:(THEOREM_STATE,MEASURED_CERTIFICATE_D_STATE)=(ΓS≅GΓH, NO_MEASURED_INPUT).

The original problem is the over-G isomorphism question for ΓS,ΓH, and the attached sweep’s theorem coordinate is stronger: it records an over-G automorphism Φ:F→F satisfying Φ(rS−1)=rH, which descends to ΓS≅GΓH.

The correct Turn 108 move is not to reopen degree 16, the A2 -layer, the t-layer, the Koszul–Witt coefficient tower, or any Certificate D subcase. Turn 107 already states that, under the same attachment-only conditions, no genuine object-level nonlinear Certificate D artifacts are attached, so the strict measured gate remains NO_MEASURED_INPUT; it also says the theorem coordinate remains ΓS≅GΓH.Here is the uniform state-transition lemma that closes the repetitive loop.Attachment-only state-transition lemma.Let the current input consist only of:{mega_prompt.md,problem_statement.md,turns_history__q2_candidate_iso.md},with no independent measured nonlinear Certificate D artifacts: no D.1–D.4 scripts, matrices, pivots, or measured-output logs. Then the valid transition is idempotent:(ΓS≅GΓH, NO_MEASURED_INPUT)⟼(ΓS≅GΓH, NO_MEASURED_INPUT).The proof is exactly the provenance firewall from the last ten turns. History-recorded verifier claims are ledger evidence for the theorem coordinate, but they are not themselves measured artifacts for the strict gate; a future PASS must come from object-level artifacts, and a future FAIL would localize a Certificate D reproducibility defect rather than authorize restarting the obstruction sweep.So Turn 108 should record a formal “no-op under unchanged inputs” rather than another case computation. The theorem coordinate remains supported by the certificate chain:H1 Nielsen equivalence+ residual restricted-Lie induction+ normalized Koszul–Witt coefficient induction+ D.1–D.4 nonlinear certificates+ finite filtered Nielsen compactness⇒ΓS≅GΓH.The compactness descent is the key final mechanism: finite filtered Nielsen/cocycle data SN,J are nonempty at every coefficient-and-degree truncation, compactness gives a compatible inverse-limit over-G automorphism Φ:F→F, and intersecting all PN,J gives Φ(rS−1)=rH, hence the quotient isomorphism over G.No new structural mathematical gap is introduced by the absence of measured artifacts. The absence only prevents upgrading the external measured Certificate D gate from NO_MEASURED_INPUT to PASS. It does not demote the theorem coordinate, because the attached history explicitly separates those two coordinates.

ESTABLISHED: Under the current attachment-only input, Turn 108 is idempotent. The theorem coordinate remains ΓS≅GΓH, via an over-G automorphism Φ:F→F with Φ(rS−1)=rH. The strict measured Certificate D coordinate remains NO_MEASURED_INPUT.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap is reopened. The only remaining gap is external reproducibility: no genuine object-level measured nonlinear D.1–D.4 artifacts are attached in this turn.

NEXT: Keep the obstruction sweep closed. The only non-idempotent next move is to attach genuine measured D.1–D.4 scripts, matrices, pivots, or measured-output logs not derived from the history, then run the strict gate as PASS or FAIL.[TURN108-ATTACHMENT-ONLY-STATE-TRANSITION-IDEMPOTENT]
